metadata.title: Adrián Martínez | Software Engineering Student
metadata.description: Personal portfolio of Adrián Martínez, Software Engineering student specializing in web development and software architecture
metadata.keywords: software engineering, web development, portfolio, student, programming

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
bio: I am a {age}-year-old software engineering student based in Oviedo, Spain. My profile is focused on software engineering, with the main goal of developing high-quality solutions, implementing the best security practices in the process.
I have gained valuable experience through various projects, both individual and collaborative, which have strengthened my skills in different areas.
I consider myself a proactive person, with problem-solving skills and a commitment to continuous learning. I enjoy teamwork and strive to contribute significantly to the projects I am involved in.
In my free time, I keep up to date with the latest trends within the industry. I also enjoy reading, sports, and exploring new cultures through travel.

items.title: Bachelor's in Software Engineering (Bilingual Program)
items.description: Enrolled in the bilingual program, focusing on software development, algorithms, and system architecture. Participating in various coding competitions and hackathons.

items.title: Web Development Certification
items.description: Certification in web development technologies, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks.

items.title: Cambridge English B2 Certificate
items.description: Cambridge qualification demonstrating upper-intermediate proficiency in English.

items.title: Esquema Nacional de Seguridad (CCN-Cert)
items.description: Certification in the National Security Framework, focusing on information security management and best practices.

1.title: WiChat - Quiz Game Platform (2025)
1.description: Development of a web application quiz contest inspired by the TV show 'Saber y Ganar'. The platform offers real-time multiplayer gaming, timed challenges, rankings, and different question categories.

2.title: DLP - Making a Compiler from scratch (2025)
2.description: Development of a compiler from scratch using Java. Includes lexical analysis, parsing, and code generation.

3.title: Database Management System (2025)
3.description: Implementation of a database management system (DBMS) from scratch using C++. Features include basic queries, data storage, and index optimization.

4.title: Shell (2025)
4.description: Development of a functional shell in C that supports basic commands, input/output redirection, and background process execution.

5.title: Task Manager (2024)
5.description: Web application for task management that allows users to create, edit, and organize tasks with an authentication system and a modern interface.

6.title: Information Retrieval (2024)
6.description: Information retrieval system that processes and analyzes large volumes of text to provide relevant results according to search queries.

7.title: F1 Desktop Application (2024)
7.description: Desktop application to manage and visualize information related to Formula 1, including teams, drivers, and race results.

8.title: Unreal Engine Game Project (2024)
8.description: Development of a video game using Unreal Engine, implementing game mechanics, physics systems, and interactive interfaces.

9.title: HTTP Server (2025)
9.description: Implementation of a basic HTTP server capable of handling GET and POST requests, serving static files, and processing forms.

10.title: Twitter Bot (2025)
10.description: Automated Twitter bot that interacts with users, publishes scheduled content, and collects trend data.

11.title: Url Shortener (2025)
11.description: Web application that allows users to shorten long URLs. Made using Spring & MongoDB

headersValidator.title: HTTP Headers Validator
headersValidator.description: Analyze HTTP security headers of any website to identify potential vulnerabilities and security improvements.

descriptions.CORS: Controls which origins can access your website's resources.
descriptions.CSP: Defines which resources can be loaded to prevent XSS attacks.
descriptions.HSTS: Forces HTTPS usage for all future communications.
descriptions.X-Frame-Options: Prevents your site from being loaded in a frame/iframe by other sites.
descriptions.X-Content-Type-Options: Prevents MIME sniffing and enforces declared Content-Type.
descriptions.Referrer-Policy: Controls how much referrer information is included with requests.
descriptions.Permissions-Policy: Controls which browser features can be used.

errors.networkError: Error connecting to server. Please try again.

passwordChecker.title: Password Checker
passwordChecker.description: Analyze the strength and security of your passwords using entropy algorithms and verification against compromised password databases.

strengthRemarks.veryWeak: ⚠️ Very Weak: Easily guessable! Change it immediately.
strengthRemarks.weak: ⚠️ Weak: Can be cracked quickly. Use a stronger password.
strengthRemarks.moderate: ✅ Moderate: Decent password, but can still be improved.
strengthRemarks.strong: ✅ Strong: Hard to guess, but consider making it longer.
strengthRemarks.veryStrong: ✅ Very Strong: Excellent password! Highly secure.

passwordChecker.minLengthWarning: A minimum of {min} characters is recommended for better security
